a8179f0fc.title: Latent Cache Flow: Model-to-Model Communication Without Text
a8179f0fc.body:
arXiv:2605.22863v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM agents today communicate via text, which incurs considerable latency and information loss due to the need to autoregressively decode the sharer model's state and encode at the receiver model. Recent work such as Cache-to-Cache (C2C; Fu et al., 2026) seeks to exchange KV caches by learning adapters that translate sharer KV matrices to the receiver

a0045e12f.title: Reading Calibrated Uncertainty from Language Model Trajectories
a0045e12f.body:
arXiv:2605.22864v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The maximum softmax probability (MSP) represents a default approach when evaluating uncertainty quantification for language model generation with structured output. Although cheap, it is often miscalibrated. Methods that probe the model's internal activations feed raw hidden states into opaque classifiers, reading activations as static snapshots and

点击下方「查看原文」阅读完整内容。

In practice, deciding what to compute and transmit at each point is pivotal; yet as multimodal sensor suites (cameras, LiDAR/depth, etc.) proli

点击下方「查看原文」阅读完整内容。

abcd26e7b.title: FuRA: Full-Rank Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning with Spectral Preconditioning
abcd26e7b.body:
arXiv:2605.22869v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Both full fine-tuning (Full FT) and parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods such as LoRA introduce weight updates without accounting for the spectral structure established during pretraining. As a result, noisy gradients from limited fine-tuning data can perturb robust pretrained features. We identify spectral preconditioning as the missing ingredien

点击下方「查看原文」阅读完整内容。

ae25537a1.title: The Readout Shortcut: Positional Number Copying Dominates Arithmetic CoT Readout in Small Language Models
ae25537a1.body:
arXiv:2605.22870v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting is necessary for arithmetic in small language models, yet shuffling its steps preserves most performance. What does CoT contribute if not logical sequencing? In three 1-3B instruction-tuned LMs on GSM8K, we isolate the answer-readout stage via prefix completion and identify a positional shortcut: the model copies whic

点击下方「查看原文」阅读完整内容。

a20fd63f6.title: BOHM: Zero-Cost Hierarchical Attribution for Compound AI Systems
a20fd63f6.body:
arXiv:2605.22866v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Compound AI systems route tasks through hierarchies of specialised components. Attribution is dominated by Shapley-based methods (SHAP), which decompose a coalition value function into per-component marginal contributions and require evaluation of the system on arbitrary component subsets. That requirement fails for third-party APIs, opaque endpoints

ad01feb8a.title: Reward Hacking in Reinforcement Learning
